description: Secure OpenClaw skill marketplace — verified alternative to ClawHub

userStories.title: Beautiful responsive frontend
userStories.notes: Built: hero, stats, category filters, search, sort, skill cards, detail modal, submit form, status polling

userStories.title: Admin panel
userStories.notes: Built: token login, review queue, approve/reject/rescan/delete, admin stats bar

userStories.title: Railway deployment config
userStories.notes: requirements.txt, Procfile, CLAUDE.md with deploy instructions all present

userStories.title: Real skill submission flow end-to-end
userStories.notes: GitHub URL verification, background scan, auto-approve if score>=80, manual review queue working
